[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@global-torque/design-tokens](./design-tokens.md) &gt; [designTokens](./design-tokens.designtokens.md)

## designTokens variable

Resolved, deeply frozen neutral design tokens.

Values are generated from the package's DTCG 2025.10 source. Use `modes.light` or `modes.dark` explicitly; the runtime never detects a preferred mode.

**Signature:**

```typescript
designTokens: {
  readonly "modes": {
    readonly "dark": {
      readonly "component": {
        readonly "button": {
          readonly "disabled-background": "#1e293b";
          readonly "disabled-foreground": "#94a3b8";
          readonly "focus-ring": "#5eead4";
          readonly "primary-background": "#5eead4";
          readonly "primary-background-hover": "#99f6ed";
          readonly "primary-foreground": "#042f2e";
        };
        readonly "dialog": {
          readonly "background": "#1e293b";
          readonly "foreground": "#f8fafc";
          readonly "overlay": "rgb(0 0 0 / 0.64)";
        };
        readonly "input": {
          readonly "background": "#111827";
          readonly "border": "#94a3b8";
          readonly "border-focus": "#5eead4";
          readonly "disabled-background": "#1e293b";
          readonly "disabled-foreground": "#94a3b8";
          readonly "foreground": "#f8fafc";
        };
        readonly "toast": {
          readonly "negative-background": "#450a0a";
          readonly "negative-foreground": "#fca5a5";
          readonly "neutral-background": "#1e293b";
          readonly "neutral-foreground": "#e2e8f0";
          readonly "positive-background": "#052e16";
          readonly "positive-foreground": "#86efac";
        };
      };
```
